                sieve[j] = false

            }

        }

    }

        let x = nums[i]

        if x == 1 {

            continue

        }

        var factors = Set<Int64>()

        var temp = x

        if temp % 2 == 0 {

            factors.insert(2)

            while temp % 2 == 0 {

                temp /= 2

            }

        }

        var i = 3

        while i*i <= temp {

            if temp % i == 0 {

                while temp % i == 0 {

                    temp /= i

                }

            i += 2

        }
